seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: The email must include at least two reasons for requesting the extension.
new_constraint: Do not include any reasons for requesting the extension.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The email must include at least two reasons for requesting the extension. Do not include any reasons for requesting the extension.
response:
Subject: Urgent Request for Extension: [Project Name] – [Your Full Name]

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to respectfully request a short extension on the [Project Name], which is currently due in two days. Unfortunately, I am facing some unexpected challenges that are preventing me from completing the assignment to the standard required by the deadline.

First, I encountered a significant technical issue with the software required for the project that has caused me to lose several hours of progress. Second, I have been dealing with a sudden family emergency that has made it difficult for me to focus on my coursework over the past 48 hours.

I am committed to submitting high-quality work and would greatly appreciate the opportunity to submit the project by [Proposed New Date/Time]. Please let me know if this adjustment is possible or if there are other steps I need to take.

Thank you for your time and understanding.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]  
[Your Student ID Number]  
[Course Name/Number]
